contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 15
- Description: Derive valid expense ledgers dynamically from treasury cache — fix AGL15 rejection
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/141
  
  Details:
  User reported expense submissions failing with 'Invalid Target Ledger AGL15 for expense. Shipping and operational expenses must use Target Ledger: offchain.' Traced error to server/routes/dao.py where _VALID_EXPENSE_LEDGERS was hardcoded to {offchain} (added June 29 as starter set). Replaced with _get_valid_expense_ledgers() that dynamically reads the treasury cache's ledgers[] array (sourced from Shipment Ledger Listing column A) via the existing validators.fetch_treasury_cache() (lru_cached, one fetch per process lifetime). Falls back to {offchain} when cache unavailable. Updated error message to list accepted ledgers. Deployed to dao_protocol_nelanco production box. Agent: DeepSeek via opencode CLI.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 25.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
